summary: Reworked Repeater-Finder passes end-to-end. Backend 15/15 pytest green (bands, suggest, search with combinable filters + radius, geocode, detail regression, MongoDB coord persistence). Frontend on 390x844 mobile: hub tiles all navigate; /repeater renders header 'Repeater-Finder'; typing 'Zug' shows repeater-suggest with 4 items (top row DB0ZU / Zugspitze / 2m); band chips render dynamically with real counts (10m 19, 6m 5, 2m 310, 70cm 1479, 23cm 121, 13cm 2, 3cm 3) and 2m selected shows '310 Treffer'; freq input '145,600' and '145.600' both narrow to '54 Treffer' when combined with 2m and to '54 Treffer' alone; radius toggle reveals GPS button + location input + geocode button; 'München' geocodes -> label 'München' appears + repeater-radius-slider at default 30 km; near query returns cards with a green distance badge (e.g. DB0ULR 7.7 km) and result line '1 Treffer · ≤ 30 km'; 'Aktualisieren' (repeater-refresh-button) appears while pendingCoords>0; toggling radius OFF returns to '310 Treffer' alphabetical. Tapping a suggestion navigates to /repeater/detail (repeater-detail visible, DB0ZU/Zugspitze, Bayern County, DE 145.7250 MHz shown).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Emitted from the suggestBox in /app/frontend/app/repeater/index.tsx (styles.suggestBox uses shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset). Migrate to boxShadow or wrap in Platform.select so web uses boxShadow and native keeps shadow*.

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Likely originates from an ancestor component (KeyboardAwareScrollView / react-native-keyboard-controller or similar). Move pointerEvents to style if it appears in project code; if internal to a library, note the library version.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow in repeater/index.tsx styles.suggestBox to silence the RN web deprecation warning.
Optional: audit any pointerEvents prop usage and move it to style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to 625 lines with three feature domains (status/flugfunk/repeater) sharing one _CACHE_TTL. Splitting the repeater block into backend/routers/repeater.py + backend/services/repeaterbook.py would help before more features land.

In /api/repeater/search, when both `freq` and `bands` are combined, the band membership is checked via the pre-computed `r['band']`. That's consistent, but note that a query like `freq=145.6875&bands=70cm` will return count=0 silently (freq falls in 2m). Consider surfacing a hint or a validation error if this ever confuses users.

Nominatim /api/repeater/geocode enforces the 1 req/s rate limit via a single global lock which is correct, but there is no per-IP guard; a burst of client requests will queue on the server. Consider a lightweight LRU (query -> {lat,lon,display}) cache to avoid re-geocoding common German city names.
seed_data_creation: None. RepeaterBook DACH cache warmed on startup; repeater_coords MongoDB collection is populated lazily by search traffic.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL https://funk-toolbox.preview.emergentagent.com, mobile 390x844. Backend cache warms at supervisor startup; /api/repeater/bands + /api/repeater/search return in <200 ms. Radius flow was validated with manual location (Nominatim geocode 'München' -> ~48.14/11.58); GPS in web preview is not reliable (browser geolocation is blocked in iframe) — do NOT fail radius tests on that. The `pendingCoords` count decreases over successive calls as the background _coord_worker backfills MongoDB collection repeater_coords (already verified: count>0 after a radius query). Frontend testIDs used: tool-tile-{morse,antenna,callsign,bandplan,repeater}, repeater-text-input, repeater-text-clear, repeater-suggest, repeater-suggest-item-<id>, repeater-band-<band>, repeater-freq-input, repeater-freq-clear, repeater-radius-toggle, repeater-gps-button, repeater-location-input, repeater-geocode-button, repeater-location-label, repeater-location-change, repeater-radius-slider, repeater-refresh-button, repeater-results, repeater-count, repeater-item-<id>, repeater-attribution, repeater-detail.
